creator: scott-ports@tummy.com
text:
On Thu, May 15, 2008 at 09:30:46PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
>Maintainer of sysutils/heartbeat,
>
>Please note that PR ports/123704 has just been submitted.
>
>If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>and a committer will take care of it.

I approve the patch.  Thank you for the contribution.

-Scott

>The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/123704
>
>-- 
>Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
>edwin@FreeBSD.org
